title: Calling on musicians to join philharmonic orchestra
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Inspired by the recent visit...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Inspired by the recent visit of the South African Army Band and the Community Philharmonic Orchestra, a group of Knysnarians and music professionals have come together to establish Knysna’s very own orchestra.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Inspired by the recent visit of the South African Army Band and the Community Philharmonic Orchestra, a group of Knysnarians and music professionals have come together to establish Knysna’s very own orchestra."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Desmond Solomon, CEO of the newly registered non-profit Knysna Orchestra, says the initiative is a passion project designed to bring the community together through the power of music."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We believe the orchestra will enrich Knysna’s cultural landscape and offer a platform for both local and professional musicians to showcase their talents,” said Solomon.","html":"“We believe the orchestra will enrich Knysna’s cultural landscape and offer a platform for both local and professional musicians to showcase their talents,” said Solomon."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Knysna Orchestra will be event-driven, focusing on performances within Knysna and surrounds.","html":"The Knysna Orchestra will be event-driven, focusing on performances within Knysna and surrounds."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While future outreach efforts are planned, Solomon emphasised that the current priority is to build a solid foundation.","html":"While future outreach efforts are planned, Solomon emphasised that the current priority is to build a solid foundation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We have to build first before considering performances outside of Knysna. This orchestra is being designed for Knysna,” he explained.","html":"“We have to build first before considering performances outside of Knysna. This orchestra is being designed for Knysna,” he explained."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As part of its launch, the Knysna Orchestra is now actively recruiting musicians and support staff to join its inaugural team."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Applicants must be able to read music and are invited to apply for the following positions: Strings, woodwinds, brass, percussion, rhythm section, pianist, administrative support, marketing and promotions.","html":"Applicants must be able to read music and are invited to apply for the following positions: Strings, woodwinds, brass, percussion, rhythm section, pianist, administrative support, marketing and promotions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“There are so many venues in and around Knysna to host concerts. We are so excited and can’t wait for this initiative to take flight,” Solomon said.","html":"“There are so many venues in and around Knysna to host concerts. We are so excited and can’t wait for this initiative to take flight,” Solomon said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Interested applicants are encouraged to email their details and relevant experience to: [email protected]","html":"Interested applicants are encouraged to email their details and relevant experience to: [email protected]"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Calling on musicians to join philharmonic orchestra
